roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:66 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  15  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT MAY SERVE HIS SENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM, CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 60 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT360,  HEWILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,  A BED WILLBE AVAILABLE FOR CLIENT ON FRIDAY, SEPTEMBER 12, 2014,  THIS HAS BEEN CONFIRMED BY MICHAEL DAVILA OF HEALTHRIGHT360,  ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TO MODIFY TREATMENT, CHANGE THE TREATMENT PROGRAM, SEND PAROLEE INTO A DETOX FACILITY IN THE EVENT OF A RELAPSE AND IMPLEMENT ANY OTHER THERAPEUTIC MEASURE AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE 60 DAYSOF TREATMENT,  IF CLIENT FAILS TO COMPLETE HIS 60 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENTWITHOUT A LAWFUL JUSTIFICATION, HE MAY BE SUBJECT TO A NEW PAROLE VIOLATION PETITION,PAROLE WAS SUSPENDED ON 7-8-2014,PAROLE IS REINSTATED AS OF 8-19-2014,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONSGIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
